form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 3rd of 8 at Hawera on March 25 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Marie Antoinette carrying 58.5kg at $13.70. The run before that 4th of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1340m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Lucky Penny carrying 58.5kg at $10.20. Overdue for a win and could sneak a place.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months ran last in a small field at this track on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 10 len behind So We Go with 57.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up second last in a small field at Trentham on October 18 over 1200m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Yamal with 58kg at $7. Still early in the prep and might need more time.

form.formComment: Gelding by Earthlight making his first appearance. Won a Taupo trial over 1100m on March 17. Could well make a positive start to his career.
